scripts.build:check: npm run packages:check && npm run typecheck
scripts.build:clean: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.capture:baseline: npm run capture:examples:baseline && npm run capture:functional:baseline && npm run capture:reference:baseline && npm run capture:site:baseline
scripts.capture:check: npm run capture:examples:check && npm run capture:functional:check && npm run capture:reference:check && npm run capture:site:check
scripts.check: npm run packages:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run order:check && npm run exports:check && npm run api:check
scripts.check:rust:all: npm run lint:rust:all && npm run format:rust:check
scripts.check:rust:core: npm run lint:rust:core && npm run format:rust:check
scripts.check:rust:extras: npm run lint:rust:extras && npm run format:rust:check
scripts.ci: npm run build:wasm && npm run check:wasm && npm run build && npm run check && npm run test && npm run size && npm run test:functional && npm run test:examples && npm run test:reference
scripts.fix: npm run order:fix && npm run lint:fix && npm run format
scripts.preview:examples: npm run build:examples && npm run preview --workspace=@flighthq/examples
scripts.preview:functional: npm run build:functional && npm run preview --workspace=tools/functional
scripts.preview:site: cross-env PAGES_BASE=/ npm run build:site && npx -y serve tools/site
scripts.test:baseline:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:baseline:wasm "Wasm regression baselines are not available yet."
scripts.test:coverage:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:coverage:wasm "Wasm coverage is not configured."
scripts.test:examples: npm run test:examples:smoke && npm run test:examples:parity
scripts.test:examples:parity:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:examples:parity:wasm "Examples wasm has only one renderer cell, so cross-renderer parity is not available."
scripts.test:examples:regression:baseline:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:examples:regression:baseline:wasm "Examples wasm fingerprint baselines are not committed yet."
scripts.test:examples:regression:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:examples:regression:wasm "Examples wasm fingerprint baselines are not committed yet."
scripts.test:functional: npm run test:functional:smoke && npm run test:functional:parity
scripts.test:functional:parity:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:functional:parity:wasm "Functional tests do not define wasm renderer entries."
scripts.test:functional:regression:baseline:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:functional:regression:baseline:wasm "Functional tests do not define wasm renderer entries."
scripts.test:functional:regression:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:functional:regression:wasm "Functional tests do not define wasm renderer entries."
scripts.test:functional:smoke:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:functional:smoke:wasm "Functional tests do not define wasm renderer entries."
scripts.test:parity: npm run test:functional:parity && npm run test:examples:parity && npm run test:reference:parity
scripts.test:parity:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:parity:wasm "No wasm parity suite is available yet."
scripts.test:reference: npm run test:reference:smoke && npm run test:reference:parity
scripts.test:reference:parity:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:reference:parity:wasm "Reference tests compare JS/OpenFL renderers and do not define wasm renderer entries."
scripts.test:reference:regression:baseline:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:reference:regression:baseline:wasm "Reference tests compare JS/OpenFL renderers and do not define wasm renderer entries."
scripts.test:reference:regression:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:reference:regression:wasm "Reference tests compare JS/OpenFL renderers and do not define wasm renderer entries."
scripts.test:reference:smoke:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:reference:smoke:wasm "Reference tests compare JS/OpenFL renderers and do not define wasm renderer entries."
scripts.test:regression: npm run test:functional:regression && npm run test:examples:regression && npm run test:reference:regression
scripts.test:regression:baseline: npm run test:functional:regression:baseline && npm run test:examples:regression:baseline && npm run test:reference:regression:baseline
scripts.test:regression:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:regression:wasm "No wasm regression suite is available yet."
scripts.test:rust:all:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:rust:all:wasm "Rust wasm test runners are not configured."
scripts.test:rust:core:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:rust:core:wasm "Rust wasm test runners are not configured."
scripts.test:rust:extras:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:rust:extras:wasm "Rust wasm test runners are not configured."
scripts.test:size:baseline:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:size:baseline:wasm "Wasm size baselines are not configured."
scripts.test:size:wasm: node ./scripts/unavailable-test.mjs test:size:wasm "Wasm size tests are not configured."
scripts.test:smoke: npm run test:functional:smoke && npm run test:examples:smoke && npm run test:reference:smoke
scripts.test:wasm: npm run test:unit:wasm && npm run test:examples:wasm
